Mathematics.descriptionZh: 基础数学、应用数学、离散数学与概率统计。
Mathematics.descriptionJa: 基礎数学、応用数学、離散数学、確率統計。
Mathematics.descriptionEn: Core mathematics, applied mathematics, discrete math, probability, and statistics.

Computer-Science.descriptionZh: 算法、数据结构、形式语言、系统与计算理论。
Computer-Science.descriptionJa: アルゴリズム、データ構造、形式言語、システム、計算理論。
Computer-Science.descriptionEn: Algorithms, data structures, formal languages, systems, and theory of computation.

Electrical-Electronic.descriptionZh: 电路、电子、信号、通信与计算机硬件。
Electrical-Electronic.descriptionJa: 回路、電子、信号、通信、計算機ハードウェア。
Electrical-Electronic.descriptionEn: Circuits, electronics, signals, communications, and computer hardware.

Physics.descriptionZh: 力学、电磁学、量子与物理数学。
Physics.descriptionJa: 力学、電磁気学、量子論、物理数学。
Physics.descriptionEn: Mechanics, electromagnetism, quantum topics, and mathematical physics.

Chemistry.descriptionZh: 物理化学、无机化学等化学相关考点。
Chemistry.descriptionJa: 物理化学、無機化学などの化学分野。
Chemistry.descriptionEn: Physical chemistry, inorganic chemistry, and related chemistry topics.

Probability-Statistics.descriptionZh: 概率论、统计推断、随机过程与相关方法。
Probability-Statistics.descriptionJa: 確率論、統計推論、確率過程、および関連手法。
Probability-Statistics.descriptionEn: Probability theory, statistical inference, stochastic processes, and related methods.

Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.labelJa: データ科学・人工知能
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.descriptionZh: 数据分析、机器学习、知识表示与智能系统。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.descriptionJa: データ分析、機械学習、知識表現、知的システム。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.descriptionEn: Data analysis, machine learning, knowledge representation, and intelligent systems.

Operations-Research.labelJa: オペレーションズ・リサーチ
Operations-Research.descriptionZh: 优化、排队论、动态规划与决策问题。
Operations-Research.descriptionJa: 最適化、待ち行列、動的計画法、意思決定問題。
Operations-Research.descriptionEn: Optimization, queueing theory, dynamic programming, and decision problems.

Bioinformatics.descriptionZh: 序列分析、认知神经、医学信息等交叉方向。
Bioinformatics.descriptionJa: 配列解析、認知神経、医療情報などの学際領域。
Bioinformatics.descriptionEn: Sequence analysis, cognitive neuroscience, medical informatics, and related interdisciplinary topics.

Engineering.descriptionZh: 机械、材料、土木等工学基础题。
Engineering.descriptionJa: 機械、材料、土木などの工学基礎。
Engineering.descriptionEn: Foundational engineering problems in mechanics, materials, civil engineering, and related fields.

General.descriptionZh: 题解说明、参考资料和暂不宜细分的综合标签。
General.descriptionJa: 解答方針、参考資料、まだ細分化しない総合タグ。
General.descriptionEn: Solution notes, reference material, and broad tags that are not yet worth splitting further.

Mathematics.Calculus.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Calculus.descriptionZh: 极限、微分、积分与多变量微积分。
Mathematics.Calculus.descriptionJa: 極限、微分、積分、多変数微積分。
Mathematics.Calculus.descriptionEn: Limits, differentiation, integration, and multivariable calculus.

Mathematics.Linear-Algebra.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Linear-Algebra.descriptionZh: 矩阵、线性变换、特征值、分解与内积空间。
Mathematics.Linear-Algebra.descriptionJa: 行列、線形変換、固有値、分解、内積空間。
Mathematics.Linear-Algebra.descriptionEn: Matrices, linear transformations, eigenvalues, decompositions, and inner product spaces.

Mathematics.Complex-Analysis.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Complex-Analysis.descriptionZh: 复数、复函数、留数与解析函数。
Mathematics.Complex-Analysis.descriptionJa: 複素数、複素関数、留数、正則関数。
Mathematics.Complex-Analysis.descriptionEn: Complex numbers, complex functions, residues, and analytic functions.

Mathematics.Differential-Equations.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Differential-Equations.descriptionZh: 常微分方程、动力系统与相关解析方法。
Mathematics.Differential-Equations.descriptionJa: 常微分方程式、力学系、関連する解析手法。
Mathematics.Differential-Equations.descriptionEn: Ordinary differential equations, dynamical systems, and related analysis methods.

Mathematics.Vector-Calculus.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Vector-Calculus.descriptionZh: 梯度、散度、旋度、线积分与曲面积分。
Mathematics.Vector-Calculus.descriptionJa: 勾配、発散、回転、線積分、面積分。
Mathematics.Vector-Calculus.descriptionEn: Gradient, divergence, curl, line integrals, and surface integrals.

Mathematics.Discrete-Mathematics.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Discrete-Mathematics.descriptionZh: 组合、递推、离散结构与基础证明。
Mathematics.Discrete-Mathematics.descriptionJa: 組合せ、漸化式、離散構造、基礎的な証明。
Mathematics.Discrete-Mathematics.descriptionEn: Combinatorics, recurrences, discrete structures, and basic proofs.

Mathematics.Graph-Theory.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Graph-Theory.descriptionZh: 图、树、匹配、平面图与图同构。
Mathematics.Graph-Theory.descriptionJa: グラフ、木、マッチング、平面グラフ、同型。
Mathematics.Graph-Theory.descriptionEn: Graphs, trees, matchings, planar graphs, and graph isomorphism.

Mathematics.Number-Theory.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Number-Theory.descriptionZh: 整数、整除、最大公约数与数论算法。
Mathematics.Number-Theory.descriptionJa: 整数、整除、最大公約数、整数論的アルゴリズム。
Mathematics.Number-Theory.descriptionEn: Integers, divisibility, greatest common divisors, and number-theoretic algorithms.

Mathematics.Fourier-Analysis.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Fourier-Analysis.descriptionZh: 傅里叶级数、傅里叶变换与卷积。
Mathematics.Fourier-Analysis.descriptionJa: フーリエ級数、フーリエ変換、畳み込み。
Mathematics.Fourier-Analysis.descriptionEn: Fourier series, Fourier transforms, and convolution.

Mathematics.Geometry.subject: Mathematics
Mathematics.Geometry.descriptionZh: 几何对象、空间结构与计算几何基础。
Mathematics.Geometry.descriptionJa: 幾何対象、空間構造、計算幾何の基礎。
Mathematics.Geometry.descriptionEn: Geometric objects, spatial structures, and computational geometry basics.

Computer-Science.Data-Structures-Algorit.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Data-Structures-Algorit.labelJa: データ構造とアルゴリズム
Computer-Science.Data-Structures-Algorit.descriptionZh: 常见数据结构、排序、搜索、图算法、动态规划与算法复杂度。
Computer-Science.Data-Structures-Algorit.descriptionJa: 主要なデータ構造、整列、探索、グラフアルゴリズム、動的計画法、計算量。
Computer-Science.Data-Structures-Algorit.descriptionEn: Common data structures, sorting, searching, graph algorithms, dynamic programming, and complexity.

Computer-Science.Programming.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Programming.descriptionZh: 程序阅读、实现、语言语义与代码分析。
Computer-Science.Programming.descriptionJa: プログラム読解、実装、言語意味論、コード解析。
Computer-Science.Programming.descriptionEn: Program reading, implementation, language semantics, and code analysis.

Computer-Science.Computer-Architecture.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Computer-Architecture.labelJa: コンピュータアーキテクチャ
Computer-Science.Computer-Architecture.descriptionZh: 指令、缓存、流水线、内存层次与性能分析。
Computer-Science.Computer-Architecture.descriptionJa: 命令、キャッシュ、パイプライン、記憶階層、性能解析。
Computer-Science.Computer-Architecture.descriptionEn: Instructions, caches, pipelines, memory hierarchy, and performance analysis.

Computer-Science.Operating-Systems.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Operating-Systems.labelJa: オペレーティングシステム
Computer-Science.Operating-Systems.descriptionZh: 进程、内存管理、虚拟内存与系统资源管理。
Computer-Science.Operating-Systems.descriptionJa: プロセス、メモリ管理、仮想記憶、システム資源管理。
Computer-Science.Operating-Systems.descriptionEn: Processes, memory management, virtual memory, and system resource management.

Computer-Science.Formal-Languages.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Formal-Languages.labelJa: 形式言語とオートマトン
Computer-Science.Formal-Languages.descriptionZh: 文法、自动机、形式语言与计算理论基础。
Computer-Science.Formal-Languages.descriptionJa: 文法、オートマトン、形式言語、計算理論の基礎。
Computer-Science.Formal-Languages.descriptionEn: Grammars, automata, formal languages, and foundations of computation theory.

Computer-Science.Databases.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Databases.descriptionZh: 数据库模型、查询、事务与数据管理。
Computer-Science.Databases.descriptionJa: データベースモデル、クエリ、トランザクション、データ管理。
Computer-Science.Databases.descriptionEn: Database models, queries, transactions, and data management.

Computer-Science.Networks.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Networks.labelJa: コンピュータネットワーク
Computer-Science.Networks.descriptionZh: 网络协议、通信机制与网络系统。
Computer-Science.Networks.descriptionJa: ネットワークプロトコル、通信機構、ネットワークシステム。
Computer-Science.Networks.descriptionEn: Network protocols, communication mechanisms, and network systems.

Computer-Science.Graphics.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Graphics.descriptionZh: 计算机图形、几何处理、投影与重建。
Computer-Science.Graphics.descriptionJa: コンピュータグラフィックス、幾何処理、投影と再構成。
Computer-Science.Graphics.descriptionEn: Computer graphics, geometric processing, projection, and reconstruction.

Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Dat.subject: Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Dat.descriptionZh: 数据处理、数据分析、特征工程与数据驱动建模。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Dat.descriptionJa: データ処理、データ分析、特徴量設計、データ駆動モデリング。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Dat.descriptionEn: Data processing, analysis, feature engineering, and data-driven modeling.

Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Art.subject: Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Art.descriptionZh: 知识表示、语义网络与智能系统基础。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Art.descriptionJa: 知識表現、意味ネットワーク、知的システムの基礎。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Art.descriptionEn: Knowledge representation, semantic networks, and foundations of intelligent systems.

Computer-Science.Quantum-Computing.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Quantum-Computing.descriptionZh: 量子计算模型、量子算法与计算复杂性。
Computer-Science.Quantum-Computing.descriptionJa: 量子計算モデル、量子アルゴリズム、計算複雑性。
Computer-Science.Quantum-Computing.descriptionEn: Quantum computing models, quantum algorithms, and computational complexity.

Electrical-Electronic.Circuits.subject: Electrical-Electronic
Electrical-Electronic.Circuits.descriptionZh: 电路分析、电子电路与模拟/数字硬件基础。
Electrical-Electronic.Circuits.descriptionJa: 回路解析、電子回路、アナログ/デジタルハードウェア基礎。
Electrical-Electronic.Circuits.descriptionEn: Circuit analysis, electronic circuits, and analog/digital hardware foundations.

Electrical-Electronic.Digital-Logic.subject: Electrical-Electronic
Electrical-Electronic.Digital-Logic.descriptionZh: 组合逻辑、时序逻辑、加法器与同步电路。
Electrical-Electronic.Digital-Logic.descriptionJa: 組合せ論理、順序論理、加算器、同期回路。
Electrical-Electronic.Digital-Logic.descriptionEn: Combinational logic, sequential logic, adders, and synchronous circuits.

Electrical-Electronic.Signal-Processing.subject: Electrical-Electronic
Electrical-Electronic.Signal-Processing.descriptionZh: 离散信号、变换、滤波与频域分析。
Electrical-Electronic.Signal-Processing.descriptionJa: 離散信号、変換、フィルタリング、周波数領域解析。
Electrical-Electronic.Signal-Processing.descriptionEn: Discrete signals, transforms, filtering, and frequency-domain analysis.

Electrical-Electronic.Control-Theory.subject: Electrical-Electronic
Electrical-Electronic.Control-Theory.descriptionZh: 系统建模、稳定性、反馈与控制系统分析。
Electrical-Electronic.Control-Theory.descriptionJa: システムモデリング、安定性、フィードバック、制御系解析。
Electrical-Electronic.Control-Theory.descriptionEn: System modeling, stability, feedback, and control system analysis.

Electrical-Electronic.Communications.subject: Electrical-Electronic
Electrical-Electronic.Communications.descriptionZh: 通信信道、编码、信息传输与误差控制。
Electrical-Electronic.Communications.descriptionJa: 通信路、符号化、情報伝送、誤り制御。
Electrical-Electronic.Communications.descriptionEn: Communication channels, coding, information transmission, and error control.

Probability-Statistics.Probability.subject: Probability-Statistics
Probability-Statistics.Probability.descriptionZh: 概率分布、条件概率、随机变量与基础概率模型。
Probability-Statistics.Probability.descriptionJa: 確率分布、条件付き確率、確率変数、基礎的な確率モデル。
Probability-Statistics.Probability.descriptionEn: Probability distributions, conditional probability, random variables, and foundational probability models.

Probability-Statistics.Statistical-Infer.subject: Probability-Statistics
Probability-Statistics.Statistical-Infer.descriptionZh: 估计、检验、最大似然与判别分析。
Probability-Statistics.Statistical-Infer.descriptionJa: 推定、検定、最尤法、判別分析。
Probability-Statistics.Statistical-Infer.descriptionEn: Estimation, testing, maximum likelihood, and discriminant analysis.

Computer-Science.Information-Theory.subject: Computer-Science
Computer-Science.Information-Theory.descriptionZh: 熵、互信息、信源编码、信道容量与纠错编码。
Computer-Science.Information-Theory.descriptionJa: エントロピー、相互情報量、情報源符号化、通信路容量、誤り訂正符号。
Computer-Science.Information-Theory.descriptionEn: Entropy, mutual information, source coding, channel capacity, and error-correcting codes.

Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Mac.subject: Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Mac.descriptionZh: 分类、决策树、强化学习与学习模型。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Mac.descriptionJa: 分類、決定木、強化学習、学習モデル。
Data-Science-Artificial-Intelligence.Mac.descriptionEn: Classification, decision trees, reinforcement learning, and learning models.

Probability-Statistics.Stochastic-Proces.subject: Probability-Statistics
Probability-Statistics.Stochastic-Proces.descriptionZh: 马尔可夫链、随机源与随机过程模型。
Probability-Statistics.Stochastic-Proces.descriptionJa: マルコフ連鎖、確率情報源、確率過程モデル。
Probability-Statistics.Stochastic-Proces.descriptionEn: Markov chains, stochastic sources, and stochastic process models.

Operations-Research.Optimization.subject: Operations-Research
Operations-Research.Optimization.descriptionZh: 优化建模、分支定界、组合优化与决策问题。
Operations-Research.Optimization.descriptionJa: 最適化モデリング、分枝限定法、組合せ最適化、意思決定問題。
Operations-Research.Optimization.descriptionEn: Optimization modeling, branch and bound, combinatorial optimization, and decision problems.

Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.subject: Operations-Research
Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.descriptionZh: 排队模型、到达过程、服务过程与系统性能。
Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.descriptionJa: 待ち行列モデル、到着過程、サービス過程、システム性能。
Operations-Research.Queueing-Theory.descriptionEn: Queueing models, arrival processes, service processes, and system performance.

Physics.Mechanics.subject: Physics
Physics.Mechanics.descriptionZh: 经典力学、振动、旋转参考系与连续介质基础。
Physics.Mechanics.descriptionJa: 古典力学、振動、回転座標系、連続体の基礎。
Physics.Mechanics.descriptionEn: Classical mechanics, oscillation, rotating frames, and continuum basics.

Physics.Electromagnetism.subject: Physics
Physics.Electromagnetism.descriptionZh: 电场、磁场、麦克斯韦方程与电磁现象。
Physics.Electromagnetism.descriptionJa: 電場、磁場、マクスウェル方程式、電磁現象。
Physics.Electromagnetism.descriptionEn: Electric fields, magnetic fields, Maxwell equations, and electromagnetic phenomena.

Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.subject: Physics
Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.descriptionZh: 量子态、算符、自旋与量子统计基础。
Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.descriptionJa: 量子状態、演算子、スピン、量子統計の基礎。
Physics.Quantum-Mechanics.descriptionEn: Quantum states, operators, spin, and foundations of quantum statistics.

Physics.Thermodynamics.subject: Physics
Physics.Thermodynamics.descriptionZh: 热力学、统计系综、分布函数与物性基础。
Physics.Thermodynamics.descriptionJa: 熱力学、統計集団、分布関数、物性基礎。
Physics.Thermodynamics.descriptionEn: Thermodynamics, ensembles, distribution functions, and foundations of physical properties.

Physics.Ocean-Physics.subject: Physics
Physics.Ocean-Physics.descriptionZh: 海洋中的波动、流动、传播与物理过程。
Physics.Ocean-Physics.descriptionJa: 海洋における波動、流れ、伝播、物理過程。
Physics.Ocean-Physics.descriptionEn: Waves, flows, propagation, and physical processes in the ocean.

Chemistry.Physical-Chemistry.subject: Chemistry
Chemistry.Physical-Chemistry.descriptionZh: 热化学、反应动力学、量子化学与物理化学基础。
Chemistry.Physical-Chemistry.descriptionJa: 熱化学、反応速度論、量子化学、物理化学基礎。
Chemistry.Physical-Chemistry.descriptionEn: Thermochemistry, reaction kinetics, quantum chemistry, and physical chemistry basics.

Chemistry.Inorganic-Chemistry.subject: Chemistry
Chemistry.Inorganic-Chemistry.descriptionZh: 元素、配位化学、无机反应与结构。
Chemistry.Inorganic-Chemistry.descriptionJa: 元素、錯体化学、無機反応、構造。
Chemistry.Inorganic-Chemistry.descriptionEn: Elements, coordination chemistry, inorganic reactions, and structures.

Bioinformatics.Bioinformatics.subject: Bioinformatics
Bioinformatics.Bioinformatics.labelJa: バイオインフォマティクス
Bioinformatics.Bioinformatics.descriptionZh: 序列分析、编辑距离、比对与生命信息处理。
Bioinformatics.Bioinformatics.descriptionJa: 配列解析、編集距離、アラインメント、生命情報処理。
Bioinformatics.Bioinformatics.descriptionEn: Sequence analysis, edit distance, alignment, and biological information processing.

Bioinformatics.Cognitive-Neuroscience.subject: Bioinformatics
Bioinformatics.Cognitive-Neuroscience.descriptionZh: 认知、神经系统与相关信息处理问题。
Bioinformatics.Cognitive-Neuroscience.descriptionJa: 認知、神経系、関連する情報処理問題。
Bioinformatics.Cognitive-Neuroscience.descriptionEn: Cognition, nervous systems, and related information processing problems.

Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.subject: Engineering
Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.descriptionZh: 应力、应变、梁、材料变形与强度。
Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.descriptionJa: 応力、ひずみ、梁、材料変形、強度。
Engineering.Mechanics-of-Materials.descriptionEn: Stress, strain, beams, material deformation, and strength.

Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.subject: Engineering
Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.descriptionZh: 流体运动、波动、连续介质与工程流动问题。
Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.descriptionJa: 流体運動、波動、連続体、工学的な流れ問題。
Engineering.Fluid-Mechanics.descriptionEn: Fluid motion, waves, continua, and engineering flow problems.

Engineering.Materials-Science.subject: Engineering
Engineering.Materials-Science.descriptionZh: 材料结构、性质、相变与材料工程基础。
Engineering.Materials-Science.descriptionJa: 材料構造、性質、相転移、材料工学基礎。
Engineering.Materials-Science.descriptionEn: Material structures, properties, phase transitions, and materials engineering basics.

General.Reference-Material.subject: General
General.Reference-Material.descriptionZh: 参考资料、说明页与暂不适合细分的综合内容。
General.Reference-Material.descriptionJa: 参考資料、説明ページ、まだ細分化しない総合コンテンツ。
General.Reference-Material.descriptionEn: Reference material, guide pages, and general content not ready for finer classification.
